task_completion.description: Verify the default download directory in Edge is set to /home/ga/Documents/FieldData
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Microsoft Edge Settings page under 'Downloads'. The 'Location' path should be explicitly set to '/home/ga/Documents/FieldData'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Home button is enabled and points to the correct URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Microsoft Edge Settings page (Start, home, and new tabs / Appearance). The Home button toggle should be ON, and the custom URL field should contain 'https://www.weather.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the startup pages are configured to OSHA and Weather.gov
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Microsoft Edge Settings page under 'Start, home, and new tabs'. The 'Open these pages' option should be selected, listing both 'https://www.osha.gov' and 'https://www.weather.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the three specified web pages are saved in the FieldData directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal listing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/FieldData'. It should contain saved HTML files or webpage folders corresponding to OSHA construction, OSHA fall protection, and Weather.gov safety.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Field Resources' favorites folder exists and contains the correct bookmarks
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Microsoft Edge Favorites menu, sidebar, or bookmarks bar. There should be a folder named 'Field Resources' containing bookmarks for OSHA Construction, OSHA Fall Protection, and Weather Safety.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration summary text file is created on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying a file named 'field_config_summary.txt' located on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/), containing text that documents the completed browser configurations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Microsoft Edge graphical interface to configure settings and bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Edge browser window open to Settings and Favorites menus, rather than just terminal windows running scripts or editing Edge's hidden JSON preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually loaded the target websites before saving them
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the actual OSHA and Weather.gov websites rendered in the Edge browser, confirming the agent didn't just create dummy files named like the websites.

integrity.description: Verify the summary file contains a genuine description of the work done
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of 'field_config_summary.txt'. It should contain a human-readable summary of the configurations applied, not just a direct copy-paste of the task prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target download directory is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/FieldData'. The Home button URL must be 'https://www.weather.gov'. The two startup URLs must be 'https://www.osha.gov' and 'https://www.weather.gov'. The three saved pages and bookmarks must correspond to 'https://www.osha.gov/construction', 'https://www.osha.gov/fall-protection', and 'https://www.weather.gov/safety/'. The bookmark folder must be exactly named 'Field Resources'. The summary file must be located at '/home/ga/Desktop/field_config_summary.txt'.
